response: This matte stainless steel water bottle keeps drinks ice-cold for 24 hours or piping hot for 12, with zero condensation that never leaves wet rings on your desk. It fits every standard car cup holder, features a leak-proof one-handed flip top that survives being tossed in backpacks and gym bags, and comes in seven soft, scratch-resistant muted hues. There’s no harsh plastic aftertaste, just clean, perfectly tempered water every time you take a sip.
